evidence_summary: Docs-only round publishes one milestone-4 refreshed decision artifact only, rereads the accepted round-199/round-198 P5-vs-P2 ledger plus the preserved round-192 negative-family settlements against the accepted round-193 vocabulary, selects exactly one evidence-backed refreshed token explicit boundary-revision candidate, defers any follow-on enablement or next-family consequence to direction-4b, and stays within the authorized docs-only scope apart from controller-owned orchestrator/state.json bookkeeping.
